raw_searches.query: news intelligence platform AI startup launch funding 2026
raw_searches.abstract: No new news intelligence startups with significant funding found Q1 2026. Major rounds: Yann LeCun's AMI ($1B seed, world models/JEPA architecture — unrelated), Harvey legal AI ($200M at $11B — unrelated), Granola meeting AI ($125M). No direct WorldPulse competitors launched.

v4.27.0 released March 9, 2026. Podcasts & Opinions feature (YouTube clips, podcasts), Daily Briefing, enhanced article navigation, crash fixes. Still 50K+ sources. No real-time verification, no geographic map, no AI signal scoring.

raw_searches.query: open source news aggregation real-time verification platform 2026
raw_searches.abstract: FreshRSS, tt-rss, selfoss remain traditional aggregators without intelligence features. WorldMonitor + Intell Weave confirmed active. No new well-resourced open-source intelligence platforms found. WorldPulse's real-time map + verification engine remain differentiators.
